questions.question: In the “Three Pillars of Data Storytelling,” which pillar ensures credibility?
What distinguishes data journalism from traditional reporting?
options: Its reliance on interviews over datasets
Its use of storytelling without data
Its treatment of datasets as the primary source
questions.correctAnswer: Its treatment of datasets as the primary source

questions.question: Which principle emphasizes that data should not be manipulated to support a pre-existing conclusion?
What is the defining characteristic of a reader-driven narrative?
Which of the following best defines an infographic?
options: A textual explanation of complex ideas
A visual representation of information for clarity and speed
A diagram used only for instructional purposes
A collection of unrelated visual elements
questions.correctAnswer: A visual representation of information for clarity and speed

questions.question: Which infographic type is best suited for showing chronological progression?
What is the primary UX goal of an instructional “how-to” infographic?
During the infographic design process, what is the main purpose of wireframing?
According to LATCH, which method is best when information has no inherent relationship?
Which Gestalt principle explains why objects placed close together are perceived as related?
What is “chartjunk”?
options: Decorative elements that distract from data
questions.correctAnswer: Decorative elements that distract from data
